DebugWarning: Please note you have debug mode turned on. It isn't recommended to leave this on unless you have a purpose for it.
Rush: What a rush! Gets me every time!
SaveAreYouSureDesktop: Are you sure you want to exit to desktop
SaveAreYouSureMenu: Are you sure you want to return to the main menu
SaveProgressNotSaved: Progress and current location will not be saved
SaveProgressSaved: Progress and current location will be saved
cfg.debug_logging.name: Debug Logging
cfg.debug_logging.desc: Write detailed diagnostic info to the BepInEx log. Turn on before reporting bugs.
cfg.auto_save.name: Auto Save
cfg.auto_save.desc: Save your game automatically on a timer while you play.
cfg.save_interval_minutes.name: Save Interval (Minutes)
cfg.new_file_on_auto_save.name: New File On Auto Save
cfg.new_file_on_auto_save.desc: On: every auto save creates a new file. Off: a single auto save file is reused each time.
cfg.save_on_new_day.name: Save On New Day
cfg.save_on_new_day.desc: Save at the start of every in-game day. Runs independently of the Auto Save timer.
cfg.new_file_on_new_day_save.name: New File On New Day Save
cfg.new_file_on_new_day_save.desc: On: each new-day save gets its own file. Off: a single new-day save file is reused.
cfg.new_file_on_manual_save.name: New File On Manual Save
cfg.new_file_on_manual_save.desc: On: each manual save creates a new file. Off: your manual save overwrites the currently loaded slot.
cfg.backup_saves_on_save.name: Backup Saves On Save
cfg.backup_saves_on_save.desc: Copy your save files to a backup folder inside the mod plugin directory every time the game saves.
cfg.maximum_saves_visible.name: Maximum Saves Visible
cfg.maximum_saves_visible.desc: How many saves to show in the Load Game list. 0 = unlimited.
cfg.sort_mode.name: Sort Mode
cfg.sort_mode.desc: How the Load Game list is ordered. Game Time uses how many in-game days have passed. Real Time uses the clock time when you saved.
cfg.sort_direction.name: Sort Direction
cfg.sort_direction.desc: Descending puts newest or most-progressed saves at the top. Ascending puts oldest at the top.
cfg.pin_last_played_to_top.name: Pin Last Played To Top
cfg.pin_last_played_to_top.desc: Float the save you most recently loaded or saved to the top of the list, regardless of sort.
cfg.manual_save_key_bind.name: Manual Save Key Bind
cfg.manual_save_key_bind.desc: Keyboard shortcut to save your game instantly.
cfg.enable_manual_save_controller_button: Allow saving instantly with a controller button.
cfg.manual_save_controller_button.name: Manual Save Controller Button
cfg.manual_save_controller_button.desc: Controller button used to trigger a manual save.
cfg.save_game_notification_text.name: Save Game Notification Text
cfg.save_game_notification_text.desc: Show a small "Saved" message above your character every time the game saves.
cfg.save_on_exit.name: Save On Exit
cfg.save_on_exit.desc: Save your game when you use the Save and Exit button.
cfg.exit_to_desktop.name: Exit To Desktop
cfg.exit_to_desktop.desc: Make the Save and Exit button quit to desktop instead of returning to the main menu.
cfg.check_for_updates.name: Check for Updates
cfg.check_for_updates.desc: Show a notice on the main menu when a newer version of this mod is available on NexusMods. Click the notice to open the mod's page.
